findings.description: Digital signature metadata text inserted inline between the 'From' address block and the 'Subject' line, disrupting reading flow compared to the PDF where this metadata is not visually rendered inline.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 shows 'From: Elizabeth S. Werner / Division of Waste Management / Raleigh Central Office' followed directly by 'Subject:'. HTML inserts 'Digitally signed by Elizabeth S Werner', DN details, and date stamp between these two blocks.

findings.description: The email address 'elizabeth.werner@ncdenr.gov' in the digital signature block is wrapped in an <a href="mailto:..."> tag in the HTML, but it appears as plain text within the digital certificate information in the PDF. This constitutes link injection.
findings.evidence: HTML: elizabeth.werner@ncdenr.gov. PDF: The digital signature block shows 'email=elizabeth.werner@nc denr.gov, c=US' as plain certificate metadata text with no hyperlink.
